$ promptfolio how-it-works

01

### Install the skill

// One command. No data leaves your machine.

$ curl -sfL promptfolio.club/install.sh \| bashвњ“ promptfolio skill installed for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw & Antigravity

02

### Analyze locally

// analyzes conversations from Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw, Antigravity, Windsurf, and ChatGPT exports.

$ claude\> /promptfolio-summarize --allвњ“ Profile generated в†’ review at promptfolio.club/me

03

### Share & connect

// Review your profile, publish, and find people with the skills you need.

\> /promptfolio-search "someone good at RAG pipelines" в†’ Alex Zhang \[RAG pipelines: expert\] \[TypeScript: expert\] в†’ Maria Chen \[RAG pipelines: expert\] \[Python: expert\] в†’ Sam Park \[RAG pipelines: advanced\] \[Go: expert\]

$ quick-start
